mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course_student WHERE student_id = #{studentId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM training_result WHERE student_id = #{studentId}
SELECT ROUND(AVG(er.final_score), 1) FROM evaluation_record er JOIN training_result r ON er.result_id = r.id WHERE r.student_id = #{studentId} AND er.final_score IS NOT NULL

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(d.date, '%m-%d') AS date, COALESCE(cnt.cnt, 0) AS submissions FROM ( SELECT DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL seq.n DAY) AS date FROM ( SELECT a.N + b.N * 10 + c.N * 100 AS n FROM (SELECT 0 AS N UNION SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9) a, (SELECT 0 AS N UNION SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2) b, (SELECT 0 AS N) c ) seq WHERE seq.n BETWEEN 0 AND 29 ) d LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DATE(upload_time) AS upload_date, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM training_result WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND upload_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) GROUP BY DATE(upload_time) ) cnt ON cnt.upload_date = d.date ORDER BY d.date ASC

SELECT c.name AS name, COALESCE(ROUND( (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM training_result r2 WHERE r2.task_id IN (SELECT id FROM training_task WHERE course_id = c.id) AND r2.student_id = #{studentId}) / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM training_task WHERE course_id = c.id), 0) * 100, 0 ), 0) AS value FROM course c WHERE c.id IN (SELECT course_id FROM course_student WHERE student_id = #{studentId})

SELECT CASE WHEN er.final_score >= 90 THEN '90-100' WHEN er.final_score >= 80 THEN '80-89' WHEN er.final_score >= 70 THEN '70-79' WHEN er.final_score >= 60 THEN '60-69' ELSE '<60' END AS name, COUNT(*) AS value FROM evaluation_record er JOIN training_result r ON er.result_id = r.id WHERE r.student_id = #{studentId} AND er.final_score IS NOT NULL GROUP BY name ORDER BY FIELD(name, '90-100', '80-89', '70-79', '60-69', '<60')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course WHERE teacher_id = #{teacherId}
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT cs.student_id) FROM course_student cs JOIN course c ON cs.course_id = c.id WHERE c.teacher_id = #{teacherId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM training_result r JOIN training_task t ON r.task_id = t.id JOIN course c ON t.course_id = c.id WHERE c.teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND r.status = 0

SELECT ROUND(AVG(er.final_score), 1) FROM evaluation_record er JOIN training_result r ON er.result_id = r.id JOIN training_task t ON r.task_id = t.id JOIN course c ON t.course_id = c.id WHERE c.teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND er.final_score IS NOT NULL
SELECT c.name AS course, COUNT(cs.student_id) AS students FROM course c LEFT JOIN course_student cs ON cs.course_id = c.id WHERE c.teacher_id = #{teacherId} GROUP BY c.id, c.name ORDER BY c.name

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(d.date, '%m-%d') AS date, COALESCE(cnt.cnt, 0) AS submissions FROM ( SELECT DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL seq.n DAY) AS date FROM ( SELECT 0 AS n UNION SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 ) seq ) d LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DATE(r.upload_time) AS upload_date, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM training_result r JOIN training_task t ON r.task_id = t.id JOIN course c ON t.course_id = c.id WHERE c.teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND r.upload_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) GROUP BY DATE(r.upload_time) ) cnt ON cnt.upload_date = d.date ORDER BY d.date ASC

SELECT CASE WHEN er.final_score >= 90 THEN '优秀(90-100)' WHEN er.final_score >= 80 THEN '良好(80-89)' WHEN er.final_score >= 70 THEN '中等(70-79)' WHEN er.final_score >= 60 THEN '及格(60-69)' ELSE '不及格(<60)' END AS name, COUNT(*) AS value FROM evaluation_record er JOIN training_result r ON er.result_id = r.id JOIN training_task t ON r.task_id = t.id JOIN course c ON t.course_id = c.id WHERE c.teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND er.final_score IS NOT NULL GROUP BY name ORDER BY MIN(er.final_score) DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM student WHERE status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM teacher WHERE status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course WHERE status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM training_result WHERE status = 0

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(d.date, '%m-%d') AS date, COALESCE(cnt.cnt, 0) AS submissions FROM ( SELECT DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL seq.n DAY) AS date FROM ( SELECT a.N + b.N * 10 + c.N * 100 AS n FROM (SELECT 0 AS N UNION SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9) a, (SELECT 0 AS N UNION SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2) b, (SELECT 0 AS N) c ) seq WHERE seq.n BETWEEN 0 AND 29 ) d LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DATE(upload_time) AS upload_date, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM training_result WHERE upload_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) GROUP BY DATE(upload_time) ) cnt ON cnt.upload_date = d.date ORDER BY d.date ASC
SELECT c.name AS course, COUNT(cs.student_id) AS students FROM course c LEFT JOIN course_student cs ON cs.course_id = c.id WHERE c.status = 1 GROUP BY c.id, c.name ORDER BY students DESC

SELECT CASE WHEN er.final_score >= 90 THEN '优秀(90-100)' WHEN er.final_score >= 80 THEN '良好(80-89)' WHEN er.final_score >= 70 THEN '中等(70-79)' WHEN er.final_score >= 60 THEN '及格(60-69)' ELSE '不及格(<60)' END AS name, COUNT(*) AS value FROM evaluation_record er WHERE er.final_score IS NOT NULL GROUP BY name ORDER BY MIN(er.final_score) DESC
SELECT CASE WHEN status >= 2 THEN '已评价' ELSE '待评价' END AS name, COUNT(*) AS value FROM training_result GROUP BY CASE WHEN status >= 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ORDER BY MIN(status)

SELECT s.real_name AS studentName, t.title AS taskTitle, c.name AS courseName, r.upload_time AS uploadTime, r.file_name AS fileName, CASE WHEN r.status >= 2 THEN '已评价' ELSE '待评价' END AS statusText FROM training_result r JOIN training_task t ON r.task_id = t.id JOIN course c ON t.course_id = c.id JOIN student s ON r.student_id = s.id ORDER BY r.upload_time DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalCount, SUM(CASE WHEN r.status >= 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS scoredCount, SUM(CASE WHEN r.status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS partialCount, SUM(CASE WHEN r.status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pendingCount, ROUND(COALESCE(AVG(CASE WHEN r.status >= 1 THEN ai_avg.avg_score END), 0), 1) AS avgAiScore FROM training_result r LEFT JOIN ( SELECT result_id, AVG(ai_score) AS avg_score FROM evaluation_record GROUP BY result_id ) ai_avg ON ai_avg.result_id = r.id

SELECT t.id AS taskId, t.title AS taskName, te.real_name AS teacherName, COUNT(r.id) AS studentCount, SUM(CASE WHEN r.status >= 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS scoredCount, ROUND(COALESCE(AVG(ai_avg.avg_score), 0), 1) AS avgScore FROM training_result r JOIN training_task t ON r.task_id = t.id JOIN course c ON t.course_id = c.id JOIN teacher te ON c.teacher_id = te.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT result_id, AVG(ai_score) AS avg_score FROM evaluation_record GROUP BY result_id ) ai_avg ON ai_avg.result_id = r.id GROUP BY t.id, t.title, te.real_name ORDER BY avgScore DESC

SELECT te.real_name AS teacherName, COUNT(r.id) AS resultCount, SUM(CASE WHEN r.status >= 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS scoredCount, ROUND(COALESCE(AVG(ai_avg.avg_score), 0), 1) AS avgScore FROM training_result r JOIN training_task t ON r.task_id = t.id JOIN course c ON t.course_id = c.id JOIN teacher te ON c.teacher_id = te.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT result_id, AVG(ai_score) AS avg_score FROM evaluation_record GROUP BY result_id ) ai_avg ON ai_avg.result_id = r.id GROUP BY te.id, te.real_name ORDER BY avgScore DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalReports, ROUND(COALESCE(AVG(total_score), 0), 1) AS avgFinalScore, ROUND( SUM(CASE WHEN teacher_score IS NOT NULL AND teacher_score > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 1 ) AS teacherScoredRate FROM evaluation_report

SELECT t.title AS taskName, COUNT(r.id) AS reportCount, ROUND(COALESCE(AVG(r.total_score), 0), 1) AS avgScore FROM evaluation_report r JOIN training_task t ON r.task_id = t.id GROUP BY t.id, t.title ORDER BY avgScore DESC

SELECT te.real_name AS teacherName, COUNT(r.id) AS reportCount, ROUND(COALESCE(AVG(r.total_score), 0), 1) AS avgScore FROM evaluation_report r JOIN training_task t ON r.task_id = t.id JOIN course c ON t.course_id = c.id JOIN teacher te ON c.teacher_id = te.id GROUP BY te.id, te.real_name ORDER BY avgScore DESC

SELECT t.id AS taskId, t.title AS taskName, te.real_name AS teacherName, COUNT(DISTINCT r.id) AS studentCount, SUM(CASE WHEN r.status >= 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS aiScoredCount, ROUND(COALESCE(AVG(ai_avg.avg_score), 0), 1) AS avgAiScore, COUNT(DISTINCT rpt.id) AS reportCount, ROUND(COALESCE(AVG(rpt.total_score), 0), 1) AS avgReportScore FROM training_task t JOIN course c ON t.course_id = c.id JOIN teacher te ON c.teacher_id = te.id LEFT JOIN training_result r ON r.task_id = t.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT result_id, AVG(ai_score) AS avg_score FROM evaluation_record GROUP BY result_id ) ai_avg ON ai_avg.result_id = r.id LEFT JOIN evaluation_report rpt ON rpt.task_id = r.task_id AND rpt.student_id = r.student_id GROUP BY t.id, t.title, te.real_name ORDER BY avgAiScore DESC
